sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85101" key="polu/mucos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολύ-μυξος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n85101.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with many wicks,</tr_> of a lamp, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mart.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.41</biblScope> </bibl> tit.</sense> </entryFree>
